en.form.language_hint: Used across the app and on transactional emails sent to you. Defaults to your browser language until you change it here.

en.form.timezone_hint: Used on global pages (notifications, sessions) and as the default when creating new projects. Inside a project, the project's timezone takes precedence.
en.page.subtitle: Manage your personal preferences and region settings.
en.page.title: Account
